description: User types 'brisbane' into the 'LEAVING FROM' search field to find departure options
frame_description: The user updates the search query from 'ber' to 'brisbane', triggering a new list of airport suggestions.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Brisbane (BNE)' suggestion in the dropdown menu
frame_description: The cursor moves over the first suggestion in the list, highlighting it.

description: User clicks on 'Brisbane (BNE)' to select it as the departure location
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears and the selected location is populated into the input field.

description: User pauses after selecting the departure city, likely reviewing the form before proceeding to the destination field
frame_description: The user remains on the page with the departure field filled, while the background hero image changes.
